title: Data acquisition with Coaxial Dielectric Probes
author: Gramse, Georg
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document's intention is to provide a generic and instrument-unspecific guideline to help in the process of acquiring reliable and reproducible data with a coaxial dielectric probe. Areas covered are sample and coaxial probe handling, data storage and a few quick reminders on data analysis. Extensive advice on data analysis is beyond the document's scope.
steps_raw: This document's intention is to provide a generic and instrument-unspecific guideline to help in the process of acquiring reliable and reproducible data with a coaxial dielectric probe. Areas covered are sample and coaxial probe handling, data storage and a few quick reminders on data analysis. Extensive advice on data analysis is beyond the document's scope.
